notes: Synthetic: hourly + flat-fee planning shop with $250k account minimum and disclosed soft-dollar use.

inputs.section_body:
Item 5 — Fees and Compensation

The firm offers two engagement types. Investment management services are billed at a flat annual fee of $7,500 per household, payable monthly in arrears, with a minimum relationship size of $250,000 in investable assets. Standalone financial planning is offered at hourly rates ranging from $300 to $450 per hour depending on the complexity of the engagement.

Fees are not negotiable. The firm does not accept performance-based fees. The firm participates in soft-dollar arrangements with its custodian for certain research services, as further described in Item 12.
